subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Read a summary passage for understanding
Identify key ideas in the leisure-time passage
Answer summary questions on the text

sections.heading: Passage Focus
sections.content: The summary passage is about leisure time and how it has been spent from time immemorial.

sections.heading: Task
sections.content: Students are expected to read the passage carefully two or three times and answer the summary questions based on it.
